name: Jabitaxe
description: Jabitaxe is a small business in Toronto, Ontario, Canada owned and operated by Algocep Inc Since early 2016. Since early 2022, we've offered a wide variety of open-source miners and been a trusted original Bitaxe and Bitaxe-based miner seller. We specialize in home mining products with a main focus to decentralize Bitcoin mining. We offer excellent Technical support and fast shipping to 120+ countries.
